summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the new sidebar tabs (Overview, Manage Rooms, Bookings, Payouts). All acceptance criteria pass: tab routing works, strict 3-7 image validation on the Add Room slide-over works exactly as spec'd (helper text, save-listing-button gating, dropzone cap at 7, dropzone message 'Maximum of 7 images reached', delete pushes count back below 3 to re-disable Save), room save prepends new card to grid + toast, bookings search/status-filter/empty-state, inline check-in (bk-1001) and check-out (bk-1002) transitions with app-toast, payouts formula gives $41,996.25 available balance and $128,450 total / $4,820 pending, bank save + withdrawal toast both fire, history has 5 rows with status badges, mobile 390x844 shows no horizontal overflow across all four tabs and the room form panel is full-width. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: RoomFormPanel.tsx: `handleSave` uses `Number(price) || 0` and `Number(inventory) || 0` — an intentional 0 typed by the user would be replaced with 0 (harmless here) but negative values are not blocked though `min=0` is set on inputs. Consider clamping.
Bookings.tsx: search comparison uses `toLowerCase().includes(...)`, which also matches partial/empty strings — an empty query matches everything (intended). Good.
Payouts.tsx: `MIN_WITHDRAWAL = 50` is hard-coded — fine for mock, but should be centralised with other business constants once wired to backend.
Dashboard.tsx: `setTimeout` in the toast auto-dismiss is properly cleaned up in the useEffect return — no leak.

RoomFormPanel: opening the panel resets state via `useEffect([open])`; this discards in-progress input if the user accidentally clicks the overlay to close. Consider a confirm-before-close when the form is dirty (nice-to-have).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 tabs + strict image rule + booking transitions + payouts formula + withdrawal + mobile responsiveness pass)

test_credentials: Mocked. Prefilled login email + any non-empty password (used Secret123!).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 verified the three newly-added tabs (Manage Rooms, Bookings, Payouts) end-to-end plus mobile responsiveness. No open issues. Previous iterations 1 & 2 already cleared login, signup wizard and overview check-in flows.
verified_passing: Sidebar tab routing: nav-item-overview/rooms/bookings/payouts swap the correct panel (overview-panel, manage-rooms-panel, bookings-panel, payouts-panel).
Manage Rooms initial grid renders 5 seeded room cards; Add New Room Type opens room-form-panel.
Image rule 0->2: save-listing-button DISABLED, image-helper-text = 'Please upload at least 3 images to publish (Uploaded: 0 of 7 / 2 of 7)'.
At 3 images: save-listing-button ENABLED, helper switches to 'Great — ready to publish (Uploaded: 3 of 7)' (emerald).
At 7 images: dropzone text reads 'Maximum of 7 images reached'; further clicks do NOT add an 8th thumbnail (capped).
Deleting thumbnails via room-image-delete-{i} decreases count; going back to 2 images re-DISABLES save-listing-button.

Save flow: title 'Sky Loft Suite', price 450, inventory 8, capacity 4+, wifi+ac amenities -> panel closes, new room-card appears FIRST in rooms-grid, app-toast shows 'Sky Loft Suite is now live in your inventory'.
Bookings search 'Priya' narrows list to 1 row.
Bookings status filter 'Cancelled' narrows to 1 row.
bookings-empty renders when combo matches nothing (search='zzzz').
bk-1001 Confirmed -> Check In click -> badge becomes 'Checked-In', toast 'Amelia Hartwell is now Checked-In'.
bk-1002 Checked-In -> Check Out click -> badge becomes 'Completed', toast 'Julian Okafor's stay is now Completed'.
Payouts widgets: payout-value-total=$128,450, payout-value-available=$41,996.25 (formula verified), payout-value-pending=$4,820.
Bank Settings save fires app-toast 'Your bank information has been updated'.
request-withdrawal-button ENABLED (available >= $50) and clicking fires toast '$41,996.25 is being processed to your bank'.
payout-history contains 5 rows with payout-status badges (Processing/Completed/Failed).

Mobile 390x844: no horizontal overflow on any tab (scrollWidth == innerWidth == 390 for overview, rooms, bookings, payouts). open-menu-button -> mobile-sidebar tab switching works. room-form-panel takes full 390px width.
rca of the issue: No issue encountered in this iteration.
